summary: The user is conducting a project on the effects of yoga and has created a Google Form to collect data. They shared the structure of their form, which includes demographic questions and health-related queries, and sought advice on additional questions and data analysis using R.
facts: The user is conducting a project on the effects of yoga. The user created a Google Form to collect data for their project. The first part of the user's Google Form includes questions about "Name," "Gender," "Occupation," "Age," "Weight," "Duration," and "Diet." The second part of the user's Google Form includes 13 health-related questions using a 5-point scaling system. The user wants to analyze data from two rounds of responses to determine how many respondents are common and how many are new. The user has provided named responses with their own user ID numbers for data analysis. The user is using R for data analysis.
